headline: MOH Q2 Earnings Beat on Lower Operating Expenses, 2026 EPS View Raised
summary: Molina beats Q2 earnings estimates as lower operating expenses offset weaker premium revenues, declining membership and softer investment income, while the company raises its 2026 earnings guidance.
